title: Reveal information about container capabilities
body:
I am often asked about the list of capabilities availabel to a container.
We should be listing this data in the inspect command for effective
capabilities and the bounding set.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body: I don't think we should change that output based on this PR, we can visit this later in a different PR>

:pushpin: Commit e009533 has been approved by `TomSweeneyRedHat`
